title: Mobs Break Block
description: This mod allow mobs break blocks.You can even make Giant break mass of blocks.
body:
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0cdd74f16bd463d58f928f33bf6f9d785e66d0d_0.webp)
# Feature
The amount of blocks can be destroyed which depends on the size of mob's hitbox.
# Config

```
mobList = ["minecraft:zombie:30:0.5:0.5"] 
blacklist = ["minecraft:bedrock"] 
defaultDropChance = 1.0
playBreakSound = true
playAttackAnimation = true
showExplosionParticles = true
```
### **["_mobID_:_maxblockbreaktime_:_checkrange_:_breaktime_"]**
- maxblockbreaktime: The maximum hardness of blocks that mobs can break.
- checkrange: How far mobs can detect blocks in front of them.
- breaktime: Multiplier based on Player Destroy Time.
- blacklist Blocks that mobs in Moblist can't break
### _defaultDropChance_
- Blocks broken by mobs drop chance
### Modpack Usage
✅ There is no limits to be in any modpack!
